headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Increases its Price Target on Teradyne, Inc. (TER)
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the Best Stocks To Buy. On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target on Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) to $550 from $400. The firm maintained an Overweight rating on the stock. In an investor note, the firm noted the AI infrastructure buildout represents a “generational semiconductor cycle” that remains […]

headline: Can Teradyne (TER) Justify Its Price After AI Test And Robotics Optimism?
summary: Teradyne (TER) is back in focus after fresh analyst commentary linked its business to an AI driven semiconductor cycle. The discussion highlighted growing test equipment backlogs, spending forecasts, and new AI focused chip screening solutions. See our latest analysis for Teradyne. The recent AI driven enthusiasm around Teradyne is colliding with sharp volatility, with the share price falling 9.6% in a day and 29.1% over the past week, yet still showing a 65.3% year to date share price return...

headline: Does Teradyne’s (TER) Shift Into Growth Indices Recast Its Core AI and Robotics Narrative?
summary: In late June 2026, Teradyne, Inc. was reclassified within the Russell index family, exiting multiple Value and Defensive benchmarks while entering several Growth benchmarks, including the Russell 1000 and 3000 Growth indices. This shift toward growth-oriented indices highlights how investors and index providers are increasingly associating Teradyne with AI-linked semiconductor testing and industrial automation opportunities rather than traditional value characteristics. With Teradyne now...
